description_long: This sculpture depicts a standing human figure, likely female, with stylized features and a classical pose. The figure is dressed in a long, draped garment that covers the body from shoulders to feet, with visible folds and a belted waist. The head is detailed with wavy hair, and the facial features are roughly carved but discernible. The arms are positioned with one bent at the elbow and the other resting at the side, suggesting a relaxed stance. The surface of the sculpture is textured and appears weathered, with visible cracks and patina indicating age. The material is a dark, solid wood, giving the piece a rustic and historical appearance.
description: A weathered wooden sculpture of a standing female figure in a draped garment, with stylized hair and a classical pose. The surface is textured and aged, with visible cracks and patina.
description_view_0: Side view showing the profile of the figure, highlighting the draped garment and the curvature of the body.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the back of the head, shoulders, and the full length of the garment, with visible wood grain and cracks.
description_view_2: Opposite side profile, emphasizing the arm position and the layered folds of the garment.
description_view_3: Frontal view revealing the facial features, detailed hair, and the overall posture of the figure.
attribute_location_context: No specific installation context is visible; the background is plain and isolated.

license_info.creator_display_name: Muzeum Pomnika Historii Frombork Zespół Katedralny
